message:
feat(sdk): add stable public API surface module and fuzzing infrastructure

**SDK module** (src/sdk.rs, src/lib.rs): Introduce `pi::sdk` as the
intentionally-stable library-facing API surface for external consumers
embedding pi as a library crate. Re-exports core types from agent,
config, error, model, provider, session, and models modules through a
single curated namespace. The lib.rs doc comments are updated to direct
users to `pi::sdk` instead of reaching into internal modules.

**SDK tests** (tests/sdk_api.rs): Verify that all exported types exist,
that core types implement Clone + Debug + Send + Sync, and that the
surface compiles with expected usage patterns.

**Fuzzing feature gate** (src/lib.rs): Add a `fuzz_exports` module
behind `#[cfg(feature = "fuzzing")]` that re-exports internal parsing
types (Config, AssistantMessage, ContentBlock, SseParser, etc.) for
cargo-fuzz / libFuzzer harnesses without polluting the normal public API.

**Fuzz targets** (fuzz/): Add fuzz harness directory with Cargo.toml and
fuzz_targets/ for automated fuzz testing of internal parsers.

**Benchmark** (benches/session_save.rs): Add criterion benchmark for
session clone and save operations at various message counts (100, 1000,
5000) to track serialization performance regressions.

**Cargo.toml**: Add `arbitrary` dev-dependency with derive feature for
structured fuzzing, and new `fuzzing` feature flag.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -149,6 +149,9 @@ name = "arbitrary"
 version = "1.4.2"
 source = "registry+https://github.com/rust-lang/crates.io-index"
 checksum = "c3d036a3c4ab069c7b410a2ce876bd74808d2d0888a82667669f8e783a898bf1"
+dependencies = [
+ "derive_arbitrary",
+]
 
 [[package]]
 name = "arboard"
@@ -1250,6 +1253,17 @@ dependencies = [
  "powerfmt",
 ]
 
+[[package]]
+name = "derive_arbitrary"
+version = "1.4.2"
+source = "registry+https://github.com/rust-lang/crates.io-index"
+checksum = "1e567bd82dcff979e4b03460c307b3cdc9e96fde3d73bed1496d2bc75d9dd62a"
+dependencies = [
+ "proc-macro2",
+ "quote",
+ "syn",
+]
+
 [[package]]
 name = "derive_builder"
 version = "0.20.2"
@@ -3973,6 +3987,7 @@ name = "pi_agent_rust"
 version = "0.1.0"
 dependencies = [
  "anyhow",
+ "arbitrary",
  "arboard",
  "asupersync",
  "async-trait",

@@ -0,0 +1,34 @@
+[package]
+name = "pi_agent_rust-fuzz"
+version = "0.0.0"
+publish = false
+edition = "2024"
+
+[package.metadata]
+cargo-fuzz = true
+
+[dependencies]
+libfuzzer-sys = "0.4"
+arbitrary = { version = "1", features = ["derive"] }
+pi_agent_rust = { path = "..", default-features = false, features = ["fuzzing"] }
+
+# Prevent this from interfering with workspaces
+[workspace]
+members = ["."]
+
+# Pin asupersync to the same git revision used by the main workspace
+[patch.crates-io]
+asupersync = { git = "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/asupersync.git", rev = "673cf66" }
+
+# Pin vergen to avoid version conflict between vergen-lib 0.1.6 and 9.x
+[build-dependencies]
+vergen-gix = { version = "=1.0.9" }
+vergen = { version = "=9.0.6" }
+
+[profile.release]
+debug = 1
+
+[[bin]]
+name = "fuzz_smoke"
+path = "fuzz_targets/fuzz_smoke.rs"
+doc = false
